title: Bridge Essay: Neural correlates of mystical experience.
concept: Self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, cosmic consciousness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.
**Phase context:** Self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, cosmic consciousness.

**Neural correlates of mystical experience.** — Neuropsychologia (2016). DOI: 10.1016/j.neuropsychologia.2015.11.021. PMID: 26631541. Mystical experiences, or subjectively believed encounters with a supernatural world, are widely reported across cultures and throughout human history. Previous theories speculate that executive brain functions underpin mystical experiences. To evaluate causal hypotheses, structural studies of brain lesion are required. Previous studies suffer from small samples or do not have valid measures of cognitive functioning prior to injury. We investigated mystical experience among participants from the
